response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled individual contributor with strong distributed-systems fundamentals and recent exposure to agentic tooling, but he has never held a management or leadership role of any kind. The CTO position requires demonstrated experience scaling engineering organizations, owning architectural strategy at the executive level, governing outsourced teams, and communicating trade-offs to a board — none of which appear anywhere in his resume. His fintech exposure is limited to one early-stage investment-platform role as a developer, and his agentic AI work, while relevant in direction, is approximately one year old and scoped to tooling rather than production multi-agent system ownership.
strengths: Strong high-throughput distributed-systems background from Sociomantic, handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, real-time architectures
Current hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP-based frameworks at re:cinq, signaling awareness of the relevant emerging technology space
Polyglot engineering foundation across TypeScript, Node.js, D, C/C++, mobile, and event-driven systems, demonstrating broad technical adaptability
concerns: Zero people-management or engineering leadership experience across a 15+ year career — no evidence of hiring, team scaling, performance management, or org design
Fintech infrastructure depth is absent: no credit systems, payment flows, risk modeling, or regulatory compliance work is described
Agentic AI involvement is recent (13 months), scoped to developer tooling as an IC, with no evidence of production multi-agent system design, ownership, or failure-mode experience at scale

key_factors.factor: No engineering leadership or management experience
Distributed systems and high-throughput backend foundation
